TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_STAYCONNECTED: Connect to the nearest teammate in a {radius} radius causing you both to do {strength}% more damage.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_TURRETFIEND: Increase all of your damage by {strength}% but all turrets will be hostile to you.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_TURRETSFRIEND: Give the nearest turret in a {radius} radius a {strength}% damage boost.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_HEALAURA: Connect to the nearest teammate in a {radius} radius and heal them for {strength} every second.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_SLOWFIELD: You slow enemies by {strength}% in a {radius} area around you.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_WEALTHY: Gain {strength}% more currency from all sources.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_LUCKY: You have a {strength}% chance to find better loot.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_LOOTER: You have {radius}% increased item pickup radius.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_RANDOMISER: Your weapon has a {strength}% chance to fire a different status effect.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_ARMOURBOOSTER: Your Armour's Effects have {strength} more strength.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_AQUAFINITY: Attack {strength}% faster while in a liquid.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_DAMAGEZONE: Attacks have a {strength}% chance to create a status area, causing {halve} damage a second for {duration} seconds.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_HATCHER: You have a {strength}% chance every 5 seconds to create an explosive companion who will explode causing weapon damage.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_GRAVEREVENGE: Upon death, a creature will take over until you return.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_SPECTRALTWIN: Something unspeakable copies your actions for {halve} damage.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_SHIELDHERO: All of your HP is converted to shields.
TRINKETEFFECT_DESC_AMMOTHEFT: Killing an enemy has a {halve}% chance to drop an ammo container, restoring ammo with {strength}% bonus damage.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_LIGHTWEIGHT: You move {halve}% faster in return for {halve}% decreased defense.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_SLOWING: You move {halve}% slower in return for {halve}% increased defense.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_SLOWFIELD: You slow enemies by {strength}% in a {radius} area around you.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_REVENGE: {strength}% of damage taken is returned to the attacker.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_CEMENTED: You take no knockback from damage.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_MULTI-JUMP: Increases your jump ability based on item rarity.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_DEFENSIVEBOOSTER: Gain a bonus {strength} strength defensive shield.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_STATUSBOOST: Gain a {strength}% bonus to all status effects.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_STATUSREJECT: Gain a {halve}% damage increase but lose all status effects.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_TRINKETBOOSTER: Your Trinket's effects have {strength} more strength.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_STATUE: Increases your weapon strength by {strength}% but disables movement.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_KINETICRESERVE: Taking damage increases your next attack's strength by {strength}%.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_AGGRESSIVEDEATH: Gain {strength} seconds of Aggression when your health drops below 10HP.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_SHAREDPAIN: Gain {strength} extra weapon status effect damage, but gain that status before bonus.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_ARMOURSHIFT: Gain up to {strength} extra defense while moving, but lose {strength} while standing still.
ARMOUREFFECT_DESC_CURSED: Gain {strength}x2 armour, but gain a random status effect every second.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_FIRE:
Attacks have a {chance}% chance to cause {strength} Fire damage to enemies
for {duration} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_ICE: Attacks have a {chance}% chance to split between a {halve}% Slow and {halve} Damage for {halve} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_LIGHTNING: Attacks have a {chance}% chance to cause {strength} Lightning damage for {duration} seconds. Deals bonus damage to stunned.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_POISON: Attacks Poison the target, dealing bonus damage based on their current conditions for {duration} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_STUN: Attacks have a {chance}% chance to stun for {duration} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_SLOW: Attacks have a {chance}% chance to slow enemies by {strength}% for {duration} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_FRIENDLYBULLETS: Attacks heal other players for {strength}HP/s for {duration} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_DOUBLESHOT: Attacks have a {chance}% chance to attack again with {strength} damage.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_HEADHUNTER: Attacks deal {strength}% more damage to weakspots, but deal {strength}% less elsewhere.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_TECHNICIANRELOAD: Do double damage on your first shot after reloading.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_CARELESSINTENT: Holds twice as much ammo ({ammo}) but become unable to critically hit.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_DELIBERATEINTENT: Holds half as much ammo ({ammo}) but does 1.5x damage.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_RELOADINGWHIZZ: Reloads twice as fast but holds half ({ammo}) as much ammo.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_SLOWMOTION: Bullets move {halve}% slower but gain {strength} increased damage.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_EXPLOSIVE: Attacks explode on contact causing {strength} damage to anything nearby.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_BLOODAMMO: Attacks cost 3% of Max Health instead of ammo.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_MAGNETICPULL: Attacks generate a magnetic force pulling nearby enemies towards the bullet impact with {strength} force.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_RICOCHETCHAIN: Attacks have a {chance}% chance to bounce for {halve} damage.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_SLOPPYSHOT: Attacks have a {halve}% chance to deal double damage but also have a {halve}% chance to do nothing.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_TAUNTINGCRIT: Critical hits cause a {strength} strength aggression for {duration} seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_CURSED: Gain {strength} + {duration} Weapon Damage, but gain a random status effect every 3 seconds.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_STACKINGPOWER: Each consectutive hit add a stacking crit chance increase to a maximum of {maxChance}.
WEAPONEFFECT_DESC_HEARTSHOCK: Instantly kill an enemy when its health is below {strength}.
RC_DESC_TRACKINGSHOT: Release a bullet that flies to the nearest enemy.
RC_DESC_SPEEDSHOOT: For 10 seconds release an extra bullet every time you attack.
RC_DESC_TURRETTARGETER: Calls on your turret to attack your target.
RC_DESC_PAINFULRELOAD: Trade some of your health to instantly reload your weapon.
RC_DESC_UNLOAD: Unload the entire mag at a fast speed.
RC_DESC_BLEEDINGROUND: While active your health drains in return for infinite ammo.
RC_DESC_BUTT: Smack an enemy with your weapon knocking it back.
RC_DESC_WIDESPREAD: Shoot your bullets out in a wide arc.
RC_DESC_SUPERSHOT: Spend your entire mag on a massive shot.
RC_DESC_WEAKHUNTER: See enemy weak spots while scoped.
RC_DESC_INTENSEVISION: See enemies through walls while scoped.
RC_DESC_THROW: Throw and plant your weapon to cause {effect} AOE damage.
RC_DESC_RETURNER: Throw your weapon at the enemy, returns to you afterwards.
RC_DESC_SWIPE: Spin your weapon around you damaging anybody it hits.
RC_DESC_BLOCK: Hold your weapon to block projectiles.
RC_DESC_CHARGE: Dash forwards dealing damage to what you hit.
RC_DESC_DEFENSIVESHIELD: Hold your weapon to the sky and create a defensive shield.
RC_DESC_LINKEDSLASH: Do an attack based on your remaining health.
RC_DESC_SWAP: Swap between doing damage or healing.
RC_DESC_SPREAD: Fire multiple shots in an arc.
RC_DESC_FROZENSHOT: Place projectiles into position and fire them once released.
RC_DESC_OVERLOAD: Release a super charged beam that overheats your staff.
RC_DESC_RELEASE: Release a gust of {effect} around you.
RC_DESC_WALL: Shoot out a wall, dealing damage with {effect} as it travels.
